requirementCueLines: Technical Communication Track | Culture, Arts & Communication | University of Washington Tacoma
To complete a BA in the Technical Communication track of Writing Studies, you need to complete 65 credits, including 45 credits in upper-division (300–400 level) courses, with a minimum 2.0 GPA.
TWRT 291 Technical Communication in the Workplace
5 credits from the following list: (These courses can only be taken once, as either Track Foundational Courses or Electives.)
TWRT 331 Writing in the Natural Sciences
TWRT 350 Principles of User Centered Design
TWRT 292 Power, Privilege and Bias in Technology Design
Creative, Scientific and Technical Topics Electives (35 credits)
TWRT 201 Creative Writing in the Global Context
TWRT 320 Rhetoric, Public Life and Civic Engagement
TWRT 340 Asian American Rhetorics, Literacies and Activism
pathwayLabels: To complete a BA in the Technical Communication track of Writing Studies
